jsonld.name: Interpretive Snap
jsonld.description: The sudden perceptual shift when a charitable reading of incoherent input crystallizes into clarity, experienced not as gradual resolution but as instantaneous reorganization where the coherent thought becomes visible all at once beneath the surface error.
